preview_text:
The model favors Panama to win at 66%, while Ghana's chances stand at 11%. This represents a substantial gap: Panama is projected as a clear favorite, though the underdog is not assigned negligible probability.

The draw carries meaningful weight at 24%, suggesting this match has potential to remain competitive through regular time. The model's spread indicates Panama enters as the likely victor, but the combination of draw and Ghana win probability—totaling 34%—reflects meaningful uncertainty around a decisive outcome.

The model and market diverge sharply here. Sportsbooks and Polymarket both assign Ghana roughly 45% to win, roughly 4× the model's estimate, and give Panama only 27%, less than half the model's assessment. The dashboard presents both views without claiming superiority for either; users should weigh the divergence carefully when forming their own expectations.
